name: gap_describing_nc
description: Happy path for the LLM-accepted Non-Compliant verdict. Status=Non-Compliant paired with a GAP_DESCRIBING narrative (engine/validator.py:83-100): contains 'no documentation' and 'POA&M' which both hit _GAP_PHRASES; no affirming or NA phrase so classify_narrative returns GAP_DESCRIBING and the status-class check at validator.py:343-352 passes on first attempt. Cite verification finds USD00077777 in evidence — no UNSUPPORTED_DOC_CITATION. Narrative leads with 'Reviewed' (not 'Examined ' which is affirming) and stays well under the 70% Jaccard threshold against guidance/procedures to avoid REQUIREMENT_RESTATEMENT. Pins the third verdict class — the seed corpus now exercises Compliant, Not Applicable, AND Non-Compliant via the LLM path (with the rule_8a/8b/no-evidence shortcuts covering the deterministic NC and NA paths). A regression that demotes legitimate NC narratives to 'needs_review' (e.g. mis-classifying 'POA&M' as ambiguous, or a confidence gate sneaking onto NC verdicts) fails here.

ccis_row.guidance: The organization defines account approval workflow steps for each account type.

tagged_evidence:
## Tagged evidence
- USD00077777 Example System Access Control Plan Rev A — names approvers in general terms but does not enumerate per-account-type workflow steps.

llm_stub_proposals.narrative: Reviewed USD00077777 Example System Access Control Plan Rev A and found no documentation of per-account-type approval workflow steps. Gap added to POA&M for remediation.
